{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/anthropic-vacancies/clusters/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Кластеры вакансий

_Файлов:_ 16

h2. Содержание

* [01-ai-research-engineering.md|01-ai-research-engineering.md] — 
* [02-sales.md|02-sales.md] — 
* [03-finance.md|03-finance.md] — 
* [04-security.md|04-security.md] — 
* [05-marketing-brand.md|05-marketing-brand.md] — 
* [06-engineering-design-product.md|06-engineering-design-product.md] — 
* [07-software-engineering-infrastructure.md|07-software-engineering-infrastructure.md] — 
* [08-safeguards-trust-safety.md|08-safeguards-trust-safety.md] — 
* [09-product-management-support-ops.md|09-product-management-support-ops.md] — 
* [10-compute.md|10-compute.md] — 
* [11-legal.md|11-legal.md] — 
* [12-technical-program-management.md|12-technical-program-management.md] — 
* [13-communications.md|13-communications.md] — 
* [14-public-policy.md|14-public-policy.md] — 
* [15-public-benefit.md|15-public-benefit.md] — 
* [16-people.md|16-people.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [overview|docs/anthropic-vacancies/overview.md] (сходство 0.33)
* [12-technical-program-management|docs/anthropic-vacancies/clusters/12-technical-program-management.md] (сходство 0.23)
* [13-communications|docs/anthropic-vacancies/clusters/13-communications.md] (сходство 0.20)
